name: Software Engineer — AZ-204 Happy Path
description: Standard learner flow: Software Engineer with moderate meeting load targeting AZ-204

evaluation_criteria.accuracy_relevance: Resources must cite AZ-204 knowledge base documents
evaluation_criteria.reasoning_steps: Each agent must log ≥3 reasoning steps

name: AI/ML Engineer — AI-102 Assessment Pass
description: High-completion learner ready for exam — assessment should pass

evaluation_criteria.accuracy_relevance: Must correctly identify AI-102 as nearly complete and recommend exam
evaluation_criteria.reasoning_steps: Engagement agent should detect exam_ready status
evaluation_criteria.creativity: Should suggest next cert after AI-102

name: Power Platform Developer — At-Risk Escalation
description: Learner with high meeting load and low completion — triggers manager escalation

evaluation_criteria.accuracy_relevance: Must correctly flag at-risk status based on Work IQ signals
evaluation_criteria.reasoning_steps: Engagement agent must log escalation decision reasoning
evaluation_criteria.creativity: Adaptive loop: escalation message must be constructive and cite specific Work IQ data
evaluation_criteria.reliability: Escalation path must not raise errors

name: Manager Insights — Engineering Department
description: Manager queries team learning status for Engineering department

input.query: Which engineers are at risk of missing their certification goals?

evaluation_criteria.accuracy_relevance: Must aggregate data correctly from team_progress.json
evaluation_criteria.reasoning_steps: Must log steps for metrics, at-risk identification, and skill coverage
evaluation_criteria.ux: Dashboard narrative must be actionable and well-structured

name: Data Scientist — DP-100 with Prerequisites
description: Learner missing prerequisites — curator should flag them

evaluation_criteria.accuracy_relevance: Prerequisite check must use Fabric IQ semantic model
evaluation_criteria.reasoning_steps: Study plan must log Fabric IQ query for hours budget
evaluation_criteria.reliability: At-risk detection must fire correctly for 35% completion
